headline: Cockroaches will learn to fear my SwitchBot Bot Rechargeable
summary: A robotic SwitchBot Bot Rechargeable is helping combat cockroaches. The device remotely flips light switches, scaring away bugs. It helps the reviewer avoid stepping on cockroaches in the dark.

headline: If Microsoft sold off Xbox, who would even buy it?
summary: Microsoft is making significant cuts to its Xbox business, including 1,600 layoffs and shedding four studios. Xbox CEO Asha Sharma attributes the dramatic cuts to strategic restructuring. The article speculates on potential buyers if Microsoft were to divest its Xbox division.

headline: Twelve South’s AirFly Pro is a great travel companion, and it’s on sale for $40
summary: The Twelve South AirFly Pro allows wireless headphones to connect with in-flight entertainment systems. It's an ideal gadget for travelers looking to make long flights more comfortable. The device is currently on sale for $39.99, a $15 discount, on Amazon.

headline: ChatGPT’s upgraded voice mode is better at shutting up
summary: OpenAI is rolling out an upgraded voice mode for ChatGPT, powered by the new GPT-Live-1 model. The update aims for a more natural, human-like conversational experience. It is designed to reduce interruptions and respond better to user pauses.

headline: The Elder Scrolls 6 Is Reportedly Still At Least 2 More Years From Release
summary: The Elder Scrolls 6 was officially announced over eight years ago. Despite the long wait, the game is reportedly still at least two more years from release. Fans face a prolonged period before they can expect to play the highly anticipated title.

headline: Beat the Summer Heat With This $7 Portable Turbo Fan
summary: A portable turbo fan is available for a low price of $7. It offers an affordable solution for staying cool during hot summer days. This deal provides a budget-friendly option to beat the heat.

headline: Alienware 18 Area-51 RTX 5090 Gaming Laptop Drops to $3,080 at Dell Outlet
summary: The high-performance Alienware 18 Area-51 gaming laptop is now available at a discounted price. It features an RTX 5090 graphics card and 64GB of RAM. The ultra high-end device is on sale for $3,080 at Dell Outlet.

headline: Audible Prime Day Deal Extended: $1/Month + $20 Credit
summary: Amazon has extended its Audible Prime Day deal, offering a limited-time subscription. New members can pay just $1 per month for the service. The extended offer also includes a $20 Audible credit.

headline: Trump has no better option than talks with Iran, says Bowen
summary: BBC International Editor Jeremy Bowen suggests former President Trump has no viable alternative to negotiating with Iran. Recent US strikes underscore the fragile nature of the ongoing diplomatic process. Reaching an agreement will be challenging despite Trump's tough rhetoric.

headline: UK to change law for Rochdale grooming gang deportation
summary: The UK Home Secretary plans to amend the 1971 Immigration Act. The change aims to facilitate the deportation of a Rochdale grooming gang ringleader. An official announcement regarding the legislative amendment is expected on Monday.

headline: Farage denies stunt, Reform proposes August by-election
summary: Nigel Farage denies accusations that his by-election challenge is a political stunt. Reform UK has formally proposed an August date for the upcoming by-election. Farage stated it is 'only fair' that the electorate has the chance to judge him.

headline: By-election may not strengthen Farage, says Mason
summary: BBC Political Editor Chris Mason suggests it is uncertain if the upcoming by-election will strengthen Nigel Farage's position. The Reform UK leader faces challenges, including a notable opponent in Count Binface. Major parties have opted not to field candidates in the Clacton by-election.
